channel.title: Demo AI Feed
channel.description: Demo feed for AI news skill

item.title: OpenAI launches new agent tooling for enterprises
item.description: New enterprise APIs for agent orchestration, RAG, and token optimization.

item.title: Anthropic updates Claude with multimodal reasoning improvements
item.description: Claude receives stronger multimodal performance and lower inference latency.

item.title: Sports league AI bot helps game highlights
item.description: An AI bot for sports game highlights and social clips.
